description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker with a streamlined silhouette, primarily constructed from dark mesh and synthetic materials. The upper features a subtle woven texture, with reinforced overlays along the sides and heel for added durability. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with black laces and a padded collar for comfort. The midsole is thick and contoured, providing cushioning and support, while the outsole is slightly textured for grip. There are small accents of pink visible at the toe and heel, adding a touch of color to the otherwise monochromatic design. The overall appearance suggests a lightweight, breathable, and versatile shoe suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, dark athletic sneaker with black mesh and synthetic overlays, accented by pink details at the toe and heel. It features a standard lace-up design and a cushioned, textured sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and pink accent at the toe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel collar, heel overlay, and a glimpse of the pink outsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh texture, synthetic side panel, and the shoe's overall shape.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the lacing system, toe box texture, and the pink accent on the outsole.
